productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Boot Sauce Leather Conditioner
description: Water-based boot Sauce conditioner cleans, conditions and adds luster to all smooth leathers. It preserves leather and restores lost oils. Features a squeezable tube with built-in sponge applicator for no mess. Contains Bitrex to prevent accidental ingestion. Method of application Squeeze small amount of cream onto the sponge applicator and work into the leather Buff with a clean, dry cloth to the desired shine 1.67 fl. oz
